name: AGM-like Paraconsistent Partial Meet Abductive Expansion Operation
summary: arXiv:2607.09729v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In his 1996 doctoral thesis, Maurice Pagnucco created the first AGM-like abductive expansion operation. Taking his operation as a basis, as well as a...
description: arXiv:2607.09729v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In his 1996 doctoral thesis, Maurice Pagnucco created the first AGM-like abductive expansion operation. Taking his operation as a basis, as well as a taxonomy -- inspired by Atocha Aliseda -- responsible for highlighting and formalizing the main components of abductive reasoning, the main aim of this paper is to present a new paraconsistent AGM-li...
author: Ulisses Franceschi Eliano
